title: lastrea retusa
intro: Lastrea retusa, also known as the narrow-leaved fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Blechnaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The narrow-leaved fern is rich in antioxidants, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds that provide numerous health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Lastrea retusa is often used as a decoction, tea, or infusion, and can also be dried and used as a powder or capsule in modern supplements.
